name: Arroz De Bacalhau
recipeInstructions:
Short-grain rice adds the perfect texture to this traditional dish from northern Portugal. The salt cod may eliminate the need for additional salt.
1. Brown the onion in olive oil in a large heavy saucepan over moderate heat.
2. Shred the cod, remove the skin and bones, and wash but do not soak it.
3. Add the cod to the onion and cover; simmer for about 10 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes and cook, covered, over low heat for 20-to-30 minutes.
5. Wash and drain the rice.
6. Add 3 1/3 cups water to the pan (twice as much water as there is rice), season with salt and pepper.
7. When the water boils, add the rice; continue cooking on low heat until the rice is done, about 25-to-30 minutes.
8. Cover the pot for the last half of cooking.
